field_values.action_summary: The prisoners are thrust into a massive underground amphitheater for a ten-day gladiatorial tournament. Carter fights various men and beasts, winning over the crowd through sheer combat prowess.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the massive arena and crowd; Medium action shots of combat; Low-angle hero shots of Carter; Fast-paced handheld or tracking shots for fight sequences
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Blood and wound placement on john_carter
Weapon handling consistency across multiple fights
Crowd noise levels scaling with combat intensity
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH019_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the scale of the Warhoon gladiatorial culture through a high-spectacle tournament sequence. The scene must transition from the claustrophobic dread of imprisonment to the kinetic adrenaline of combat, emphasizing John Carter's physical dominance and the massive subterranean architecture.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- kantos_kan
- warhoon_horde
- various_beasts

## Required Environments
- subterranean_amphitheater_arena

## Continuity Constraints
- Blood/wound placement on john_carter
- Weapon handling consistency
- Crowd noise levels scaling with combat intensity

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival and Dread (Prisoners enter arena)
- BT002: Human Combat Escalation (Carter vs Men)
- BT003: Beast Combat Spectacle (Carter vs Beasts)
- BT004: Triumph and Crowd Reaction (Victory/Adrenaline)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
